overall.description: Gameplay footage from a space exploration game showing a character in a blue spacesuit walking through a metallic sci-fi corridor, transitioning to a galactic map interface for navigation. The clip demonstrates the game's third-person exploration and menu systems with distinct green and purple lighting schemes.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed sci-fi corridor with green artificial lighting. Metal walls line both sides with a viewport window on the right showing space outside. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches a circular airlock door at the end of the hall before the screen fades to black.

events.description: transition from black screen to galaxy map interface with purple starfield

agents.ego_description: player viewing the galactic map, examining star systems and navigation routes

entered.detail: purple holographic starfield with connected waypoints and navigation lines
circular galaxy symbol representing the current galactic location
glowing dots representing selectable star systems
text display showing system names and distance information

segments.scene_description: The view transitions to a holographic galaxy map interface displaying a purple starfield. A spiral galaxy icon sits in the upper left while star waypoints and navigation routes appear in the center. UI panels on the right display system information as the player examines the galactic map.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous transition from a claustrophobic industrial interior to a vast, holographic celestial interface. It begins with the camera trailing a character in a blue spacesuit through a narrow sci-fi corridor illuminated by green artificial lighting, passing a viewport that reveals the void of space. As the character approaches a circular airlock door at the end of the hall, the environment fades into darkness to bridge the shift in perspective. The scene then opens into a wide holographic galaxy map, where the green tones are replaced by a deep purple starfield. Finally, the view expands to show a spiral galaxy and navigation routes, with UI panels appearing on the right as the camera examines the galactic system.
